name: Anders Jormin
abstract: Anders Bertil Michael Jormin (born 7 September 1957) is a Swedish bassist and composer. Jormin established a musical partnership with Bobo Stenson in the mid-1980s which led to international recognition playing with Charles Lloyd, in the early 1990s.

about_quotes.speaker: Tony Marino
about_quotes.evidence: I love the Swedish bass player Anders Jormin – he’s a newer guy now.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tony Marino interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, August 25, 2025
